title: Oil prices plunge 11% after Iran says Strait of Hormuz is open for commercial vessels
snippet: WTI crude -11.4% to $83.85/bbl (lowest since Mar 10). Brent -9% to $90.38. Biggest single-day drop since war began. S&P 500 +1.2% (weekly +4.5%), Nasdaq +1.5% (weekly +6.8%), both at new record highs. Physical crude still elevated but gap narrowing.
tag_reason: 유가 11% 폭락은 전쟁 이후 최대 일일 하락폭으로 완전히 신규
